# ZverTs

> A free, AI-powered disciplined learning platform. Sequential video modules with strict watch-time enforcement, quizzes, XP streaks, badges, and verifiable completion certificates.

ZverTs converts YouTube playlists into structured courses with enforced progression — learners cannot skip ahead. Progress is tracked by actual watch time, not just clicks. Certificates are issued only after completing all modules and passing assessments.

## What ZverTs does

- Turns YouTube playlists into locked, sequential courses
- Tracks real watch time per video (no faking completion)
- Issues verifiable certificates on course completion
- Gamifies learning with XP, streaks, badges, and leaderboards
- Provides an AI tutor for per-lesson summaries and Q&A
- Supports quizzes gated behind module completion
- Available in English and Bengali

## Who it is for

Self-learners and students in Bangladesh and beyond who want structured accountability when learning web development and programming through free video content.

## Tech stack (for AI coding assistants)

- Frontend: React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, RLS, Edge Functions)
- Payments: bKash / Telegram bot approval flow
- Hosted at: https://zverts.app

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, featured courses, and onboarding CTA.
- [Courses](/courses): Browse all public courses and learning tracks.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Authenticated learner's progress hub.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top learners ranked by XP and streaks.
- [About](/info/about): Mission and vision of ZverTs.
- [FAQ](/info/faq): Frequently asked questions about ZverTs.
- [Help Center](/info/help): Self-service support topics.
- [Contact](/info/contact): How to reach the ZverTs team.
- [Affiliates](/info/affiliates): Affiliate program details.
- [Community](/info/community): Join the ZverTs learner community.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund terms and conditions.
